turns.content: man december is always tight with money
Yeah, the holidays can really stretch things thin. What's making it tight for you this month?
its not even the holidays bro its just everything at once. rent ismail needs new shoes for school and i gotta send my mom her money
That's a lot hitting at once. Where does your mom live?
khartoum. i send her money every month no matter what. like 300 400 depending on what i make. cant miss it she depends on it
That's a real commitment, sending that every month without fail. She's lucky to have a son like that. Is she doing okay over there?
shes tough bro wallahi. she raised 6 of us by herself after my father got killed. she never complained not once. so the least i can do is make sure shes good
Six kids on her own after losing your father — that's an incredibly strong woman. I can see where you get your drive from. Sending that money every month is honoring everything she did for you.
exactly. like some months i gotta drive extra just to make sure i hit that number but i never miss. never
That consistency says everything about you. Even when it means extra hours on the road, she can count on it showing up. Do your siblings help out too, or is it mostly on you?
couple of them send what they can but im the oldest here so its mostly on me. its fine tho thats just how it is
Being the oldest in that situation, you carry it because that's who you are. No resentment, just responsibility. That's real.
wallahi bro you get it. like people be out here spending money on dumb stuff and im like my mom needs to eat. priorities
Priorities look different when you know what's actually at stake. Your mom eating, your son having shoes — that's not negotiable. Everything else is extra.
facts. anyway let me figure out this budget for december inshallah it works out
Inshallah it does. If you want to bounce any budget ideas around, I'm here. You always make it work, this month won't be different.
